description: The ~9-day disc golf drive from Kansas City to the Detroit area for Worlds (spectating), Aug 17-31, 2026, in a truck camper. Drive east Aug 17-24 hitting top courses in travel order, then basecamp at Proud Lake Recreation Area Aug 24-31 while spectating Worlds. Stops are in travel order; edit and re-run build_route.py to reroute.

stops.name: Kansas City, MO
stops.notes: Leg origin — wake up in KC, drive east

stops.name: Championship Course at Eagles Crossing
stops.notes: New Truxton, MO · World #9 / US #4 / MO #1 · play both courses here (also Wild Times, MO #3)

stops.name: BC3 Disc Golf Course
stops.notes: Nashville, IN · World #92 / US #64 / IN #1 · long drive across IL/IN

stops.name: Lake Michigan overnight — Valparaiso / Crown Point, IN
stops.notes: Overnight in the camper en route from Cincinnati up to west Michigan.

stops.name: Arvesta Sport Complex
stops.notes: South Haven, MI · World #78 / US #52 / MI #4 · up the lakeshore

stops.name: Kensington Toboggan
stops.notes: Milford Twp, MI · World #63 / US #40 / MI #2 · Worlds venue area · round confirmed Mon 8/24 5:40 PM · spectate 8/26-8/30

stops.name: Proud Lake Recreation Area — campsite (basecamp)
stops.notes: 2928 Glengary Road, Commerce Twp, MI 48382 · Site 68 (Location 55-110) · 7 nights, truck camper · Worlds basecamp · Check in Mon 8/24 3:00 PM, check out Mon 8/31 1:00 PM · Reservation INMI26-3900592B1 · No sewer hookup · Recreation Passport required · (248)685-2433
